sections.paragraph:
δροσίζω 1 aor. ptc. δροσίσας 3 Macc 6:6, aor. pass. ἐδροσίσθην (since Aristoph. [mid.]; LXX) to wet with dew, bedew fig. in a spiritual sense refresh with dew IMg 14 (on the fig. use of dew cp. Dt 32:2; Pr 19:12; OdeSol 11:14).—DELG s.v. δρόσος.

aor. aor. = aorist

ptc. ptc. = participle

pass. pass. = passive (either of grammatical form or of passive experience); also used in reference to literary portion=passage

Aristoph Aristoph , V–IV b.c.—List 5

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

IMg IMg = Ignatius to the Magnesians—List 1

  1. cp. = compare, freq. in ref. to citation fr. ancient texts

OdeSol OdeSol = Gk. Ode of Solomon 11: PBodmer XI; III a.d.—List 2

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 261
